name: Stella Maris School

campuses.name: Main Campus

intelligence.verdict: Stella Maris is part of a larger education group with campuses across Jakarta and beyond.
paragraphs: Stella Maris is part of a larger education group with campuses across Jakarta and beyond.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$4.9K – US$21K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Science laboratories, Library, IT labs, Sports facilities, Auditorium.

metaDescription: Stella Maris School (North Jakarta). Stella Maris is part of a larger education group with campuses across Jakarta and beyond.…
